text: It is the policy of the Company to maintain its property and to provide a working environment that is  both  safe  for  its  employees,  and  including  others  having  business  with  the Company, or on Company property,  and  is  conducive  to  efficient  and  productive  work  standards.  This  policy restricts  certain  items  and  substances  from  being  brought  on  or  being  present  on  Company property,  prohibits  Company  employees  and  others  working  or  being  present  on  Company property from being under the influence of certain drugs and other substances, and prohibits the unauthorized possession, by employees or others, of property, equipment, materials, or proprietary information belonging to the Company or others.
